metadata.title: enabled by RAD51 Hsap
metadata.comment: I wonder if it makes sense to use GO-CAM to capture this type of regulation. "Acts as a self-inactivating ATPase, with rapid ATP hydrolysis and slow ADP dissociation. Ca(2+) by reducing the ATPase activity preserves the nucleoprotein filament in its active state, thereby stimulating the DNA strand exchange activity of RAD51."
